form.label: Review History
form.description: Historical review records for Compliance Review.

search.query: index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" | eval year = strftime(_time, "%Y") | stats count by year | sort - year | fields year

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" AND (strftime(_time, "%Y")="$filter_year$" OR "$filter_year$"="*") | eval month_num = strftime(_time, "%m") | eval month_label = strftime(_time, "%b %Y") | eval month_sort = strftime(_time, "%Y%m") | stats count by month_num month_label month_sort | sort - month_sort | fields month_num month_label

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" AND (strftime(_time, "%Y")="$filter_year$" OR "$filter_year$"="*") AND (strftime(_time, "%m")="$filter_month$" OR "$filter_month$"="*") | stats count by device | fields device

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" AND (strftime(_time, "%Y")="$filter_year$" OR "$filter_year$"="*") AND (strftime(_time, "%m")="$filter_month$" OR "$filter_month$"="*") AND (device="$filter_device$" OR "$filter_device$"="*") | stats count by department | fields department

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" AND (strftime(_time, "%Y")="$filter_year$" OR "$filter_year$"="*") AND (strftime(_time, "%m")="$filter_month$" OR "$filter_month$"="*") AND (device="$filter_device$" OR "$filter_device$"="*") | stats count by group | fields group

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" AND (strftime(_time, "%Y")="$filter_year$" OR "$filter_year$"="*") AND (strftime(_time, "%m")="$filter_month$" OR "$filter_month$"="*") AND (device="$filter_device$" OR "$filter_device$"="*") AND (department="$filter_dept$" OR "$filter_dept$"="*") | stats count by asset_id | fields asset_id

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" AND (strftime(_time, "%Y")="$filter_year$" OR "$filter_year$"="*") AND (strftime(_time, "%m")="$filter_month$" OR "$filter_month$"="*") | stats count by reviewed_by | fields reviewed_by

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff"
| where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" | where (strftime(_time, "%Y")="$filter_year$" OR "$filter_year$"="*") | where (strftime(_time, "%m")="$filter_month$" OR "$filter_month$"="*") | where (device="$filter_device$" OR "$filter_device$"="*") | where (group="$filter_group$" OR "$filter_group$"="*") | where (asset_id="$filter_host$" OR "$filter_host$"="*") | where (department="$filter_dept$" OR "$filter_dept$"="*") | where (reviewed_by="$filter_reviewer$" OR "$filter_reviewer$"="*")
| sort - _time | eval "Review Date" = strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval "Audit Job Date" = strftime(strptime(date_of_job, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") + 28800, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")
| table asset_id device department group reviewed_by remarks "Review Date" "Audit Job Date"
| rename asset_id as "Asset ID" device as "Device" department as "Department" group as "Group" reviewed_by as "Reviewed By" remarks as "Remarks"
